Vader.init(address,address,address)._utils (contracts/Vader.sol#74) lacks a zero-check on :
		- UTILS = _utils (contracts/Vader.sol#79)

Reentrancy in Vader.upgrade(uint256) (contracts/Vader.sol#228-231):
	External calls:
	- require(bool)(iERC20(VETHER).transferFrom(msg.sender,burnAddress,amount)) (contracts/Vader.sol#229)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _mint(msg.sender,amount) (contracts/Vader.sol#230)
		- _balances[account] += amount (contracts/Vader.sol#142)
	- _mint(msg.sender,amount) (contracts/Vader.sol#230)
		- totalSupply += amount (contracts/Vader.sol#141)
